title: Technical Decisions
summary: Aggregated log of locked technical and architectural decisions made across 14 build sessions, each with rationale.
notes: Aggregated decision log rather than a single ADR. Each section follows Decision/Rationale pattern characteristic of ADRs and represents accepted/locked choices already implemented in the codebase. Treated as ADR collection with locked=true since all listed decisions are confirmed and shipped. Confidence medium because file is a multi-decision rollup rather than the canonical one-decision-per-file ADR format.
